title: Vedaraniyam Heavy Rain
lead: Vedaraniyam is experiencing heavy rain with a high Z-Score of +3.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Vedaraniyam is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 86% and low wind speed of 4.1 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The CDD of 9.7 GG and HDD of 0.0 GG indicate a high energy demand due to the warm and humid conditions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
